subcodes.first_line: The weight of the chain placed about Our neck was difficult to bear, but having the thumbs of both hands bound together behind the back was even more aggravating.
subcodes.first_line_orig: زنجیر در گردن خیلی رنج آور بود ولی بدتر و سخت تر از آن این بود که انگشت ابهام هر دو دست را از پشت سر بیکدیگر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @incarceration of Baha'u'llah in Siyah Chal, @growth of the Cause
